title: Downtown Manhattan hotel market — late June 2026
subtitle: Market analysis + shortlist scoring + recommendation. Three forces have shifted in the last two weeks; the case for booking refundable now has materially strengthened.
description: Analytical report on the downtown Manhattan hotel market for late June 2026. Three findings on market dynamics (union deal, rate climb, demand drivers), a 10-hotel shortlist scored against the brief, and the refundable-now booking recommendation.
audience: Decision support · solo 7-night downtown stay · £3–4k budget
